title: Inexorable (Imperial I-class)

{{Quote|Get a location on that fighter base and detail the ''Inexorable'' to move in and destroy it.|Grand Admiral Thrawn|<ref name="HttE" />}}
The '''''Inexorable''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. This ship was best known for its role during [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. As one of the main ships of [[Thrawn's fleet (Galactic Empire)|Thrawn's fleet]], the ''Inexorable'' fought at the [[Attack on Bpfassh|battles of Bpfassh]] and [[Battle of Sluis Van|Sluis Van]].

==Description==
The ''Inexorable'' was a standard [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]].<ref name="XwA" /> It was a 1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long warship armed with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] and [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors. The ship also carried a complement of [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], terrestrial troops and various ground vehicles.<ref name="ISB" /> Due to the limitations placed upon the Empire after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the TIE complement had been reduced from six to three [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] by [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].<ref name="HttES" />

==History==
The ''Inexorable'' was constructed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] shipyards on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the tyrannical Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. It was nearing completion in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. [[Shannon Voorson]], the daughter of [[Kuat Freight Port]] officials [[Johan Voorson|Johan]] and [[Nell Voorson]], was able to [[Slicer/Legends|slice]] its name in an Imperial database along with several other [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] names and gave it to her cousin, [[Deen Voorson]], a member of the Rebellion.<ref name="SD">{{JournalCite|9|Slaying Dragons}}</ref>

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the ''Inexorable'' was seen undergoing weapons testing along with the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']], ''[[Nemesis]]'' and [[Stormhawk (Imperial I-class)|''Stormhawk'']] in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]]. [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen's]] ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' [[Reconnaissance of mercenary base|mistakenly]] emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] near the Star Destroyers but managed to escape.<ref name="XwA" />

[[File:Bpfassh_system.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Thrawn's fleet (Galactic Empire)|Thrawn's fleet]] and the ''Inexorable'' approaching [[Bpfassh]].]]

After the Battle of Endor, the ''Inexorable'' was part of the small Imperial fleet that was commanded by [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> a misknown Imperial [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] on a mission in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].<ref name="CoF">{{StoryCite|story=Crisis of Faith|book=Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition}}</ref>

In the later years, the Rebellion, now known as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], had become the legitimate galactic government. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], the ''Inexorable'' served in Grand Admiral Thrawn's [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the New Republic after his [[Thrawn's confederation|return]] to the known [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="HttE" /> The ''Inexorable'' was part of the task force of five Star Destroyers led by the Grand Admiral himself and coordinated by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Joruus C'baoth]].<ref name="HttES" /> During that campaign, ''Inexorable'' participated in the [[attack on Bpfassh]] where it destroyed the New Republic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] base on the [[Bpfassh 3|third moon]] of [[Bpfassh]]. Thrawn also used the ship to test a prototype [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]], after getting schematics from the secet Imperial [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|storehouse]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]].<ref name="HttE" /> The ''Inexorable'' later fought at the [[Battle of Sluis Van]], a failed attempt to steal a large fleet of starships at [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]], a major New Republic [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]].<ref name="HttES" />

[[File:ThrawnsArmadaOrganization-HttESourcebook.jpg|thumb|right|The ''Inexorable'' in Thrawn's Armada.]]

==Commanders and crew==
{{Quote|I have approved your suggestion that he be transferred to the ''Inexorable''. Under Thrawn he will learn lessons he should already know, or he will die.|Ysanne Isard to [[Kirtan Loor]], about Major Wortin|<ref name="WG" />}}
[[Director of Imperial Intelligence]] [[Ysanne Isard]] decided to transfer [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Wortin]] from the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] [[Corusca Rainbow|''Black Asp'']] to the ''Inexorable'' as a punishment for his "incompetence" in capturing Rogue Squadron [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Bror Jace]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].<ref name="WG" />

The [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] ignored the identity of the ''Inexorable''{{'s}} [[Captain/Legends|captain]] at the time of Thrawn's campaign.<ref name="HttES" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Inexorable'' was created by [[Timothy Zahn]] in [[1991]] book ''[[Heir to the Empire]]''. The ''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]'' describes it as one of the ship of Thrawn's core fleet but it is not mentioned in the two next books of the [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy|Thrawn Trilogy]]. 

There are 2 conflicting sources for the starship class of the ''Inexorable'': according to ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' (vol 2, p 101) the ''Inexorable'' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]], whereas ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' (Battle 6, Mission 2) and ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' (p 175) classify the ''Inexorable'' as an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]].
